chunks.title: The Plague of Frogs
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit covering the command, execution, negotiation, and removal of the first plague.

chunks.title: The Plague of Gnats
chunks.reason: A distinct narrative unit describing the second plague and the magicians' recognition of God's power.

chunks.title: The Plague of Flies
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit detailing the third plague, the distinction made for Goshen, and Pharaoh's final refusal.
